mapper.sql:
/* wms-ctmaster-strategyal-sql-oracle.xml - selectListStgAlHdsql - 할당 전략 헤더 조회 SQL */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , A.CTKEY , B.CTNM , A.ALSTGHDKEY , A.ALSTGNM , A.USEYN , A.CMT , A.INSERTDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEDATE , A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_MST_AL_STG_HD A INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY WHERE 1=1
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
mapper.select: /* wms-ctmaster-strategyal-sql-oracle.xml - selectListStgAlDt - 할당 전략 상세 조회 SQL */ SELECT CTKEY , ALSTGHDKEY , DTSEQNO , ALSTGATCD , ALSTGATDIVCD , ATVALUE1 , ATVALUE2 , CMT , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_MST_AL_STG_DT WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND ALSTGHDKEY = #{alstghdkey}
